questions.question: Explain why Amdahl's Law predicts diminishing returns when adding more processors to a parallel system.
expectedPoints: The law shows speedup is limited by sequential portion
As N increases, the parallel term P/N becomes smaller
Eventually adding more processors provides minimal benefit

questions.question: Describe how Amdahl's Law applies to GPU programming and discuss three specific sequential components that can limit speedup in GPU applications.
expectedPoints: Data transfer between CPU and GPU is a major sequential component
Serial pre-processing on CPU before GPU computation
Result aggregation and post-processing after GPU computation
I/O operations that cannot be parallelized
